description: Style NoteAdd a rock 'n roller twist to your low-top staples with this playboy pair. With a low ankle, these kicks can be worn with rolled-up denims and a tonal tee. Style it with bright teesfor a balanced look. Product DetailsBlack low-top synthetic upper with mini-stud detailing all overHas a carbon rubber covering at the toe box central lace-ups with metal eyeletsEVA midsole with foxing at the toe region and branding at the back heelTPU outsole with herringbone grooves all overMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
